description: 1. Long-lasting tournament quality Basketball 2. Exclusive Easy Shoot design3. Tyre-like sculpted rubber panels for excellent grip4. Extra bounce due to butyl, and rubber bladder for excellent bounce on all playing surfaces5. Abrasion resistant rubber and sculpted panels for high durability   Just the right product for use in schools, colleges and tournaments. Players above the age of 14 will indeed have a ball with the TARMAK basketball! Playful times ahead!
